# SSH 上传文件
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 上传到远程目录（自动取文件名）
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "upload", "local_path": "/local/file.txt", "remote_path": "/remote/dir/"}
aitk SSH_

# 上传并指定远程文件名
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "upload", "local_path": "/local/file.txt", "remote_path": "/remote/dir/", "file_name": "renamed.txt"}
aitk SSH_
